analysis: Guldner 1977 low-temperature magneto-optical series recovered through Camassel 1988 Table II
temperature_status: liquid-helium temperature; primary Guldner source states 4.2 K
transition_or_edge_definition: Pidgeon-Brown-model interaction gap from interband magnetoabsorption

data_status: secondary exact transcription with primary-figure consistency screen
promotion_boundary: Rows are exact values as printed in Camassel Table II and attributed there to Guldner. The Guldner primary Fig. 11 visibly supports the series, but no pointwise primary table or coordinate uncertainty was recovered; rows must not be labeled primary exact points.

excluded_secondary_row.reason: Camassel attributes this row to McCombe, not Guldner; it is already represented under the Wiley-McCombe lineage.
